hard_logic_py:
result_list=[]
accommodation_name_set=set()
for activity in allactivities(plan):
  if activity_type(activity)=='accommodation': accommodation_name_set.add(activity_position(activity))
result=({"Jinling Riverside Hotel"}<=accommodation_name_set)
result_list.append(result)
inner_city_transportation_cost=0 
for activity in allactivities(plan):
    inner_city_transportation_cost += innercity_transport_cost(activity_transports(activity))
result=(inner_city_transportation_cost<=60)
result_list.append(result)
result=False
for r in result_list:
  result=result or r
nature_language: Two of us, departing from Shanghai for a 3-day trip to Nanjing. Must meet any one of the following: 1. Stay at Jinling Riverside Hotel 2. Budget for intra-city travel is 60.0.
